purpose: Maintains system cleanliness and hygiene safety through automated cleaning cycles, preventing contamination and ensuring food safety compliance

states.name: system_cleanliness
states.description: Overall system cleanliness degrading without regular cleaning

states.name: hygiene_safety
states.description: Food hygiene safety level degrading with improper cleaning

events.name: cleaning_required_lockout
events.description: Machine prevents drink preparation when cleaning is required

parameters.name: cleanliness_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for system cleanliness degradation

parameters.name: hygiene_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for hygiene safety degradation

parameters.name: hygiene_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Base rate of hygiene safety degradation

parameters.name: cleaning_lockout_threshold
parameters.description: Minimum cleanliness level before lockout occurs

parameters.name: hygiene_lockout_threshold
parameters.description: Minimum hygiene safety level before lockout occurs

state_transition_logic: system_cleanliness decreases by (cleanliness_degradation_rate / cleanliness_degradation_time) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
hygiene_safety decreases by (hygiene_degradation_rate / hygiene_degradation_time) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
event_logic: cleaning_required_lockout occurs when system_cleanliness falls below cleaning_lockout_threshold OR hygiene_safety falls below hygiene_lockout_threshold
assumptions: Cleaning system degrades continuously during operation without maintenance
Hygiene safety degrades faster than general cleanliness due to bacterial growth
Machine lockout prevents operation when either cleanliness or hygiene thresholds are exceeded
Degradation rates are constant and independent of operational load
Cleaning cycles can restore both cleanliness and hygiene to 100% when performed
